purpose: Cross-seed determinism extension of F1 cycle 1 hexa Phi evaluator (N=3 -> N=10)

determinism_check.method: md5sum of stdout for each run

raw_91_C3_disclosure: phi_engine_eval.hexa main() runs deterministic registry-based selftests with no external seed input; cross-run determinism is structural (no torch/RNG path), not seeded-RNG. Determinism verdict therefore validates substrate purity not generalization across stochastic seeds. XMETA3 N=3 runs separately tests stochastic seed variation (TASK B).
